segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Welcome to the student housing office. What can I do for you? Hi. I'm looking for a two bedroom apartment and I wondered if you have some available. Yes. we do. How much is the . rent standard is $1800a month. But we also have some with a nice view of the lake. Those are two. 100. 100 is a bit much. Do you mind if I have a look at one of the standard two bedrooms? Of course, let me grab the key from the drawer.
